title: Vehicle/Block Separation Crafting Recipe
description: VBSCR allows for crafting boats/rafts with chests and minecarts with blocks back into their respective parts. This mod should work with other mods which follow the vanilla naming convention, as long as they add the recipe with the block's output.
body:
**Vehicle/Block Separation Crafting Recipe** (**VBSCR**) allows for crafting boats/rafts with chests and minecarts with chests/furnaces/hoppers/TNT back into their respective parts.

**VBSCR** _should_ work with other mods which follow the vanilla naming convention, as long as they add the recipe with the block's output. Custom boats with chests should convert back into a chest and its boat separately, and custom filled minecarts should separate just the same. **Minecarts of different materials and custom chests have not been accounted for, as compatibility with other mods was an unintentional but welcome side-effect.**
